_comment: GPU-week grid manifest, priority-ordered (P0 first). run_week.py executes top-down. GPU runs go to experiments_gpu/ (never mixed with the 50 CPU runs). Totals: P0 50, P1 50, P2 50, P3 30 = 180 runs. ENVELOPE ONLY: at a hypothetical 3x the CPU's 11.5 ep/s -> ~27 h; at 10x -> ~8 h. Real ETA comes from run_week --sanity calibration on the T4; priority order guarantees a shortfall still yields P0 (H1 power) + as much replication as time allows.

envelope_assumptions.note: hardware-dependent numbers are envelopes, not measurements; calibrate on T4

priorities.name: P0
priorities.goal: S-H1 power (W2) + core replication of headline numbers on GPU

priorities.name: P1
priorities.goal: S-R1 scope (W1): a different modulus and a different operation

priorities.name: P2
priorities.goal: S-R1 scope (W1): a harder operation and a deeper model

priorities.name: P3
priorities.goal: S-H3 (W3): OOD rerun on GPU + alternative OOD construction
